name: The Best of Brie
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole Ripe Brie As Large As You Need, Wedge Or Whole Round
2 cups Chutney (Your Favorite Variety) or Cranberry Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the top rind of the Brie carefully with a knife.
2. Allow the Brie to come to room temperature.
3. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
4. Toast pecans in the oven on a cookie sheet for 15 to 20 minutes, making sure not to burn them.
5. Place the Brie on an ovenproof platter or cookie sheet.
6. Spread with enough chutney or relish to cover.
7. Arrange the pecans attractively over the surface.
8. Bake until the cheese begins to melt.
